title: TheMoreLoyalTrident
description: Expand Trident's Loyalty enchantment by allowing it to collect your loots.
body:
# The More Loyal Trident
This is a very simple mod, adds a new feature to tridents:

The enemies' loots will be brought back if your trident has Loyalty enchantment.

Technically only required on server side.
# Misc
[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
